---
title: "Neural Operator-Based Damage Sensing Digital Twin"
description: |
  A virtual damage sensing digital twin (VDS-DT) platform for piezoelectric composites, coupling a machine learning-enabled multiscale multiphysics model with Fourier neural operator (FNO) learning.
author:
  - name: Yangyuanchen Liu
    url: https://lyyc199586.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-7730-8287
date: 2026-06-28
date-modified: last-modified
bibliography: ../../publications/papers.bib
categories: [Neural operator, Damage sensing, Digital twin]
image: vdsdt_flow.png
draft: false
---

- Developed with [`NeuralOperator`](https://neuraloperator.github.io/dev/index.html), a comprehensive `PyTorch` library for learning neural operators, containing the official implementation of Fourier Neural Operators and other neural operator architectures.
- Coupling a machine learning-enabled multiscale multiphysics model, viz. the Parametrically Upscaled Coupled Constitutive Damage Model (PUCCDM) with Fourier neural operator (FNO) learning, this work develops a Virtual Damage Sensing Digital Twin (VDS-DT) platform for piezoelectric composites. This platform interfaces with actual **surface sensor measurements** for efficient prediction of full-field temporally evolving deformation, electrical, and damage fields in the entire structure.

## Gallery

![Hierarchical structure of a Fourier neural operator (FNO)-derived Virtual Damage Sensing Digital Twin (VDS-DT)for piezoelectric composites [@liu2026vdsdt]](./vdsdt_flow.png){width="100%"}

![Input for operator learning [@liu2026vdsdt]](./panel_input.mp4){width="100%"}

![Output for operator learning [@liu2026vdsdt]](./panel_output.mp4){width="100%"}
